cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.5)

project(rlimgui)

add_library(rlimgui)

target_sources(rlimgui PRIVATE 
	"${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/rlimgui/rlImGui.cpp" 
	"${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/rlimgui/rlImGui.h" 
	"${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/rlimgui/rlImGuiColors.h"
)
target_include_directories(rlimgui PUBLIC "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/")
target_link_libraries(rlimgui PUBLIC imgui raylib_static)
